## Pull request

**Related issue**
Closes # (required — please open an issue before submitting a pull request unless this is a typo fix)

**Type of change**
- [ ] Typo or prose fix (no issue required)
- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Clarification or improved example
- [ ] New citation added to `references.bib`
- [ ] Other (describe below)

**Description**
What did you change and why? Be specific about which sections, patterns, or files are affected.

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the style guidelines (no em dashes, direct declarative constructions)
- [ ] If I added a citation, it is in APA format in `references.bib` using the existing key format
- [ ] My changes are limited in scope to one issue
- [ ] I have not restructured chapters, added new pattern entries, or modified the NLI canonical example without prior author agreement
